Data Layer — Unified Access

International Job Boards (LinkedIn, Indeed) · Chinese Platforms (Liepin, Zhaopin, Maimai, BOSS Zhipin) · Web Intelligence (News, Registries, Baike) · LYC Proprietary Database

DEX AI — Intelligence Engine

AI-powered analysis enhanced by human consultant expertise

AI Capabilities

  • Automated executive profile extraction from 12+ Chinese and international platforms
  • Natural language processing for career trajectory analysis
  • Cross-source deduplication and verification
  • Real-time org structure inference from reporting relationships
  • Continuous monitoring — org changes detected and flagged automatically

Human Expert Overlay

  • Consultants cherry-pick and validate AI-generated intelligence
  • Domain experts apply context — cultural, political, industry-specific
  • Relationship mapping beyond what algorithms can detect
  • Quality gate: every candidate profile reviewed before delivery
  • Continuous refinement — human corrections improve AI models

Unified Data Access

One platform, multiple intelligence channels — connected via API and proprietary extraction

  • Liepin (猎聘)
  • Zhaopin (智联招聘)
  • BOSS Zhipin (BOSS直聘)

  • Lagou (拉勾)

International Platforms

  • LinkedIn
  • Indeed Global
  • Glassdoor
  • Xing (Europe)
  • Naukri (India)

Web Intelligence

  • Corporate Registries (Qichacha, Tianyancha)
  • Baidu Baike / Wikipedia
  • News & Press Releases
  • Industry Publications
  • Government Filings

LYC Proprietary

  • 10,000+ curated executive profiles
  • Mandate history & placement records
  • Proprietary scoring benchmarks

All platform connections via secure API — real-time data ingestion with automated deduplication and freshness scoring

Company snapshot with mapped headcount, business unit breakdown, and data freshness

Visual hierarchy showing reporting lines, C-suite to GM level, with score overlays

Live Platform — Talent Pipeline

Filterable executive table with role, business unit, tenure, composite score, and tier classification

Talent pipeline view — shows breadth and actionability of the intelligence

Dynamic Scoring & Assessment

5-criteria framework — AI-scored, consultant-calibrated

96
Industry Relevance
Domain match to mandate requirements
92
Functional Expertise
Depth of role-specific capability
90
Leadership Scale
Team size, P&L, organizational scope
88
Track Record
Verified achievements and career progression
78
Strategic & Cultural Fit
Alignment with client context and values

Composite Score

Equal-weighted average of 5 dimensions. Tier classification: S (90+) · A (75-89) · B (60-74) · C (<60). Consultant override available with documented justification.

Approach Strategy (auto-generated)

For each scored candidate, DEX AI generates: warm introduction paths, key motivators and risk factors, optimal engagement timeline, and non-compete / restriction analysis.

Live Platform — Scoring View

Scoring overview with tier distribution, criteria breakdown, and top candidate detail

Scoring dashboard — 5-dimensional assessment with visual breakdown

Live Platform — Executive Profile Deep-Dive

One person's full profile: career trajectory, education, board seats, approach strategy, risk flags

Executive profile view — shows depth of intelligence on a single individual

Report Generation & Targeted Views

From raw intelligence to client-ready deliverables — in one click

Automated Reports

  • One-Pager Executive Summary — Client-facing PDF with scope, top candidates, approach strategy
  • Full Intelligence Report — Detailed profiles, scoring breakdown, org chart, data sources
  • Talent Pipeline Dashboard — Interactive view with filters, scoring, tier distribution
  • Data Appendix — Excel workbook with raw scoring data, source references, freshness flags
  • Custom Brief — Tailored to client format, white-label ready

Filter & View Controls

  • By Business Unit — Operations · Commercial · Corporate Affairs · Technology · Finance
  • By Seniority Level — C-Suite · VP · Director · GM · Head of Function
  • By Score Tier — S-Tier (90+) · A-Tier (75-89) · B-Tier (60-74) · C-Tier (<60)
  • By Geography — China region · International · Cross-border experience
  • By Data Freshness — Verified <3 months · Updated <12 months · Needs refresh
  • By Availability — No restrictions · Non-compete expiring · Immediately available

Live Platform — Client Deliverable Preview

The polished one-pager your client receives

Client deliverable view — engagement scope, key findings, top 3 candidates with approach strategy

Target Company Discovery

Preliminary target company listing — AI-generated, consultant-validated

1
Input
Client brief: industry, mandate, geography, leadership level
2
AI Scan
DEX AI scans proprietary database + web sources for matching companies
3
Preliminary List
Auto-generated shortlist with company profiles, size, revenue, org hints
4
Consultant Review
Human experts validate, re-rank, add context and strategic notes
5
Final Target List
Approved target companies with confidence scores and coverage assessment

Key Differentiator

Unlike static company lists, LYC Intelligence combines AI speed with consultant judgment. The preliminary list is generated in minutes, not days — and every entry is scored for data coverage before reaching the client.

Sourcing Activation

From intelligence to action — targeted sourcing workflows for consultants

1
Identify
Scored candidates flagged for specific mandate requirements
2
Activate
Consultant triggers targeted sourcing for selected individuals
3
Deep-Dive
Platform pulls additional data from specific channels per candidate
4
Enrich
Consultant adds proprietary notes, relationship context
5
Engage
Approach strategy generated — ready for client delivery

Precision Sourcing

Don't source everyone — source the right people. Score-based prioritization ensures consultant time goes to highest-value targets.

Channel-Specific Depth

When a candidate is activated, the platform pulls additional intelligence from specific channels — Liepin career history, Maimai connections, Tianyancha board seats.

Consultant Efficiency

Reduce sourcing cycle time by 60%. Intelligence gathering, scoring, and approach strategy are pre-built — consultants focus on relationships and judgment.

Why LYC Intelligence

The only platform built for cross-border executive intelligence

China + International

Native API connections to Chinese job platforms (Liepin, Zhaopin, Maimai, BOSS Zhipin) integrated with international sources — no manual bridging

AI Speed + Human Judgment

DEX AI generates intelligence at scale; consultants cherry-pick and validate for quality. Best of both worlds

Dynamic, Not Static

Org charts and scores update continuously as new intelligence flows in — never stale

End-to-End Workflow

From target company discovery through scoring to sourcing activation — one platform, no tool switching

Client-Ready Output

Automated report generation produces polished, branded deliverables ready for client presentation

Proprietary Advantage
